attributes.magic: PE32 executable (console) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain DNS Lookup (my-ip .io)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain DNS Lookup (my-ip .io)"; dns.query; dotprefix; content:".my-ip.io"; nocase; endswith; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2034196; rev:2; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2021_10_15, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2024_11_26, mitre_tactic_id TA0043, mitre_tactic_name Reconnaissance, mitre_technique_id T1590, mitre_technique_name Gather_Victim_Network_Information;)
alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Destination Unreachable Host Unreachable"; icode:1; itype:3; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:399; rev:9; )
alert ( gid:2; sid:1; rev:1; msg:"TAG_LOG_PKT"; metadata:rule-type preproc; classtype:not-suspicious; )

sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom U. @c_APT_ure (collection), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the usage of binaries such as 'net', 'sc' or 'powershell' in order to stop, pause, disable or delete critical or important Windows services such as AV, Backup, etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 , X__Junior (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Disable Microsoft Defender Firewall via Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may disable or modify system firewalls in order to bypass controls limiting network usage
A General detection for files being created in the Windows startup directory. This could be an indicator of persistence.
Detects netsh commands that turns off the Windows firewall

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh advfirewall set  currentprofile state off
values.CommandLine: netsh  advfirewall set  currentprofile state off

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh advfirewall set  currentprofile state off
values.CommandLine: netsh  advfirewall set  currentprofile state off

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh firewall set opmode mode=disable

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Hidden Executable In NTFS Alternate Data Stream
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an ADS (Alternate Data Stream) that contains an executable by looking at a non-empty Imphash
Detects execution of netsh with the "advfirewall" and the "set" option in order to set new values for properties of a existing rule

values.ParentCommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe /c netsh firewall set opmode mode=disable

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the "net" utility.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects command variations typically used by ransomware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen
